steps.title: Place the underlined sentence
steps.content: The underlined sentence follows a basic statement of where the stranger stands and comes before a detailed description of his appearance. Its phrase "impelled a closer scrutiny" signals that the following details are the result of looking more closely.

steps.title: Reject setting and contrast
steps.content: A is wrong because the sentence does not add physical details itself. B is wrong because it does not introduce the cottage setting. C is wrong because it does not contrast with the previous sentence; it prepares the closer inspection that follows. The answer is D.
